items.title: Falling Local TV Revenue Behind NBA's Slower Cap Growth, Expansion Push
items.originalTitle: Falling Local TV Revenue Behind NBA's Slower Cap Growth, Expansion Push
items.headlineZh: Falling Local TV 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Falling Local TV 相关消息更新
items.summary: Falling local television revenue is shaping the NBA's long-term financial strategy, with league officials targeting 2027 to consolidate most local media rights under a single partner, according to sources that spoke with ESPN. The league's salary cap increased just 6.7% this offseason, well below the 10% maximum allowed under terms negotiated with the players' union. A shorter postseason contributed to the shortfall, but declining local broadcast revenue remains the larger structural drag, sources said. Two years ago, the NBA signed 11-year national media rights deals worth more than $77 billion with ESPN, NBC and Amazon, tripling the value of its previous agreement. To prevent a cap spike similar to 2016, when the figure jumped 35% in a single year, the league and union agreed to cap annual increases at 10% over three seasons. New national television money has softened the impact of shrinking local deals, but the decrease remains significant. Even the New York Knicks, one of the league's marquee franchises, accepted a 28% reduction in annual payments from MSG Networks last year, cutting their local television income by $41 million. Similar reductions are playing out across the league and are expected to last into next season. The NBA hopes to address the issue in 2027, when most local rights agreements expire, by bundling them under one national partner. "It's one of the most significant financial things going on in the league right now," said one team president. "It's played at least some role in moving forward with expansion."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 Falling Local TV 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: Falling Local TV 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Falling Local TV Revenue Behind NBA's Slower Cap Growth, Expansion Push

items.title: Rayan Rupert, Sixers Agree To Two-Way Deal
items.originalTitle: Rayan Rupert, Sixers Agree To Two-Way Deal
items.headlineZh: Rayan Rupert 与 76 人达成双向合同
items.titleZh: Rayan Rupert 与 76 人达成双向合同
items.summary: Rayan Rupert and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a two-way NBA deal. Rupert was the 43rd overall pick in the 2023 NBA draft by the Portland Trail Blazers. Rupert appeared in 64 games last season with the Blazers and Memphis Grizzlies, averaging 5.2 points, 2.9 rebounds and 1.1 assists in 16.8 minutes. Rupert will be playing in his age-22 season with the Sixers.
items.summaryZh: 据 Yahoo Sports 报道，Report: 76 人 to 签下 Rayan Rupert，合同为双向。
items.oneLineZh: Rayan Rupert 与 76 人达成双向合同
originalTitles: Rayan Rupert, Sixers Agree To Two-Way Deal

items.title: NBA Executives Notice Surge In Spending On Centers In Age Of Victor Wembanyama
items.originalTitle: NBA Executives Notice Surge In Spending On Centers In Age Of Victor Wembanyama
items.headlineZh: Executives Notice Surge 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Executives Notice Surge 相关消息更新
items.summary: NBA teams are spending heavily on centers this offseason, with league executives noting a sharp rise in the going rate for big men across the market. The Los Angeles Lakers sent two first-round picks, two second-round picks and two pick swaps to the Utah Jazz in a sign-and-trade for Walker Kessler, whom they view as their long-term answer at center alongside Luka Doncic. The Lakers signed Kessler to a four-year, $130 million contract as part of the deal. "There's several teams who wanted Kessler for a few years, and if it had been a truly open market, other teams might've been willing to make a similar offer," said one NBA personnel director. "But I'd be worried about doing a big deal with the Ainges just on principle." Kristaps Porzingis, who has appeared in just 74 games over the past two seasons, signed a two-year, $40 million deal with the Golden State Warriors. Robert Williams III, who carries an extensive injury history, received three years and $44 million from the Portland Trail Blazers. Mitchell Robinson, who averaged under 20 minutes per game last season, landed a three-year, $47 million contract with the Boston Celtics. Jock Landale, a career backup, secured a one-year, $14 million deal with the Atlanta Hawks. Moritz Wagner, coming off a season-ending ACL tear, received a two-year, $19 million contract from the Brooklyn Nets to serve as a reserve. Not all of those deals are fully guaranteed. Still, the pattern reflects growing demand for size league-wide, a shift some attribute to the emergence of Victor Wembanyama as a positional standard. One Eastern Conference executive pointed to a different transaction as an undervalued move this summer. "I haven't seen it talked about at all, but what the Thunder got Hartenstein for might be one of the deals of summer," the executive said. Isaiah Hartenstein signed a three-year, $75 million extension with the Oklahoma City Thunder, representing a slight decrease in average annual value from his previous contract.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，原文聚焦 Executives Notice Surge 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: Executives Notice Surge 相关消息更新

items.title: Jaylen Brown Trade Ignites Concern NBA 'Overrun With Strategy'
items.originalTitle: Jaylen Brown Trade Ignites Concern NBA 'Overrun With Strategy'
items.headlineZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人
items.titleZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人
items.summary: The Boston Celtics' decision to trade Jaylen Brown for Paul George and draft compensation has reignited a leaguewide argument over analytics-driven roster building, according to multiple executives and coaches who spoke to ESPN. The debate traces back roughly six weeks, when Cleveland Cavaliers coach Kenny Atkinson suggested advanced metrics indicated his team should have led its Eastern Conference finals series against the New York Knicks. That comment became a defining moment of last postseason as the Cavaliers were on their way to be eliminated by the Knicks in a four-game sweep. Yahoo Sports columnist Tom Haberstroh noted that Boston has gone 36-6 over the past three seasons in games Brown has missed, a figure often cited by those defending the trade. Not everyone agrees with the approach. "The league is overrun with strategy," said an Eastern Conference scout. "Honestly, I'm not sure how many people who work in the league are actually watching the games." A Western Conference general manager pushed back on that framing. "Yes, there are more graduate degrees in front offices now, but that's only part of the picture," said the general manager. "The aprons force you to analyze all of your spending more and put more attention to detail on getting the most out of each salary slot. The owners put that into the rules, and the players accepted it. This is all a choice." Another Western Conference executive expressed concern about where the trend leads. "We're going to turn into baseball if we're not careful where you have every defender between second base and right field, and no one can get a hit and it becomes boring," said the executive. Boston's ownership group, led by Bill Chisholm, financed its record $6 billion purchase of the franchise through private equity backing, a structure some believe reinforces the club's analytical approach. The trade also marks the first major transaction for new 76ers president of basketball operations Mike Gansey, who succeeded analytics pioneer Daryl Morey earlier this offseason. Gansey played high level collegiate basketball and internationally before working his way up the Cavaliers' front office after first beginning as a scout.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人，这笔交易继续影响凯尔特人与 76 人的阵容评估。
items.oneLineZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人

items.originalTitle: Neemias Queta, Celtics Agree To Four-Year, $56M Extension
items.headlineZh: 签约动态：Neemias Queta，凯尔特人 达成 四年，5600 万美元 Extension
items.titleZh: 签约动态：Neemias Queta，凯尔特人 达成 四年，5600 万美元 Extension
items.summary: The Boston Celtics and Neemias Queta have agreed to a four-year, $56 million extension. Queta emerged last season as the Celtics starting center and is rewarded with a long-term deal. Boston picked up their $2.7 million team for Queta for the upcoming season. This extension will start with the 2027-28 season and run through the 2030-31 season. Queta played in 76 games (75 starts) last season for the Celtics. The 7-footer averaged 10.2 points, 8.4 rebounds and 1.3 blocks per game.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，签约动态：Neemias Queta，凯尔特人 达成 四年，5600 万美元 Extension，原文关注 Neemias Queta 的合同或自由市场动向。

items.summary: Rui Hachimura's representatives are in contact with the Golden State Warriors and Minnesota Timberwolves, sources told Marc Stein and Jake Fischer of The Stein Line. Hachimura is reportedly the Timberwolves' top choice to replace Julius Randle and Naz Reid at the power forward position. Hachimura was also a candidate to sign with the Spurs before the team signed Tobias Harris. The Nets remain a possible destination for Hachimura.

items.title: Knicks Have 'Shown Some Interest' In Signing LeBron James
items.originalTitle: Knicks Have 'Shown Some Interest' In Signing LeBron James
items.headlineZh: 尼克斯 Have 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: 尼克斯 Have 签约动向更新
items.summary: The New York Knicks have "shown some interest" in signing LeBron James, according to Marc Stein and Jake Fischer of The Stein Line. During a recent podcast appearance, Rich Paul said James would have signed with the Knicks this offseason had they not just won the NBA championship. "If the Knicks wouldn't have won, there'd be no board," Paul said. "He'd be going to the Knicks." The Denver Nuggets and Philadelphia 76ers have also registered their interest in James. It is widely expected around the league that James will likely take his time to come to a decision on where he plays next season. The Golden State Warriors reportedly have planned additional moves to clear cap space in case James shows interest in signing with the team. The Cleveland Cavs and Miami Heat are also mentioned as co-favorites with the Warriors to land James.
items.oneLineZh: 尼克斯 Have 签约动向更新
items.displayTitle: Knicks Have 'Shown Some Interest' In Signing LeBron James

items.title: NBA Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule
items.originalTitle: NBA Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule
items.headlineZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.summary: The NBA will test the one free throw rule during July's summer leagues in Northern California, Salt Lake City and Las Vegas. The one free throw rule has been used by the G League since 2019-20 to improve the game flow. The one free throw rule awards one free throw for any foul that would result in one, two, or three free throws. The free throw attempt is worth the same number of points as the free throws it replaces. Game switch back to the standard free throw rule when under two minutes and for overtime. The NBA will also test an embedded ball with a sensor that detects contact with the ball for the summer leagues.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 Summer League To 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: NBA Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule

items.title: Kenrich Williams, Thunder Agree To One-Year, $5M Deal
items.originalTitle: Kenrich Williams, Thunder Agree To One-Year, $5M Deal
items.headlineZh: Kenrich Williams 与雷霆达成一年，500 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Kenrich Williams 与雷霆达成一年，500 万美元合同
items.summary: Kenrich Williams and the Oklahoma City Thunder have agreed upon a one-year, $5 million deal. The Thunder previously declined their $7.2 million option on Williams for the 2026-27 season. Williams appeared in 56 games with the Thunder last season, averaging 6.5 points, 3.3 rebounds and 1.4 assists in 15.4 minutes. Williams, who is represented by Adam Pensack , was acquired by the Thunder from the New Orleans Pelicans in a trade during the 2020 offseason as part of the Steven Adams deal.

items.headlineZh: Tyus Jones 与掘金达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Tyus Jones 与掘金达成一年合同
items.summary: Tyus Jones has agreed to re-sign with the Denver Nuggets on a one-year deal. Jones appeared in 48 games last season with the Orlando Magic before he was traded to the Dallas Mavericks and was eventually waived. Jones appeared in 11 regular season games with the Nuggets, averaging 2.2 points, 1.3 rebounds and 1.2 assists in 8.3 minutes. Jones will continue to give the Nuggets backup minutes at point guard as he plays his age-30 season.

items.title: Billy Donovan Hired As Top Assistant Coach Of Spurs
items.originalTitle: Billy Donovan Hired As Top Assistant Coach Of Spurs
items.headlineZh: Billy Donovan Hired 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Billy Donovan Hired 相关消息更新
items.summary: Billy Donovan has agreed to become the lead assistant coach for the San Antonio Spurs under Mitch Johnson. Donovan will replace Sean Sweeney, who was hired as head coach of the Orlando Magic. Donovan chose to exit the Chicago Bulls as they enter into a rebuild. Donovan was a candidate for the Magic job that went to Sweeney. Before the Bulls' tenure, Donovan was head coach of the Oklahoma City Thunder and spent one season coaching Shai Gilgeous-Alexander. The Spurs are coming off an appearance in the NBA Finals, losing to the New York Knicks in five games.

items.title: Celtics Negotiated With Giannis Antetokounmpo For Extension At Less Than Full Max
items.originalTitle: Celtics Negotiated With Giannis Antetokounmpo For Extension At Less Than Full Max
items.headlineZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新
items.summary: The Boston Celtics were close enough to a trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo where they held discussions with his camp on what his extension with the franchise would look like. While Antetokounmpo is eligible for an extension worth up to $275 million over four years, the Celtics hoped to sign him to a two-year extension at 30 percent of the cap. Antetokounmpo was seeking a three-year extension at 35 percent of the cap. Antetokounmpo was eventually traded by the Milwaukee Bucks to the Miami Heat instead of the Celtics. There have not been any indications on what type of contract extension he will ultimately sign with the Heat. Antetokounmpo will become eligible to officially sign an extension with the Heat in January. "The Giannis to Boston thing was closer than I think people realize," said Bill Simmons. "I still don't think Hugo [Gonzalez] was ever in the trade. "But I do think it got to the point that Bucks had an arrangement with Giannis that-they weren't going to trade him without him signing off on it. And he didn't sign off on the Miami trade for a couple days there. And they were talking about extensions with the Celtics. And it came down to two years and 30 percent of the cap, or three years for 35. The Celtics were pretty entrenched at two for 30. And Giannis wanted the three for 35 and they couldn't agree on it. "And that was when he green-lit the Miami trade and Miami threw in [Kasparas] Jakucionis. And that's when it happened."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Negotiated With Giannis 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新
items.displayTitle: Celtics Negotiated With Giannis Antetokounmpo For Extension At Less Than Full Max

items.originalTitle: Anfernee Simons, Sixers Agree To Two-Year, $12.3M Deal
items.headlineZh: Anfernee Simons 与 76 人达成两年，1230 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Anfernee Simons 与 76 人达成两年，1230 万美元合同
items.summary: Anfernee Simons and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a two-year, $12.3 million contract. Simons will hold a player option for Year 2 of the contract. Simons received interest from the Golden State Warriors, Miami Heat, Dallas Mavericks, Boston Celtics and others. The 76ers' signing of Simons follows their trade with the Boston Celtics for Jaylen Brown.

items.title: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton
items.originalTitle: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton
items.headlineZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers do not currently have any remaining cap space to re-sign Rui Hachimura, with 13 roster spots filled and only veteran minimum contracts available for outside additions. Hachimura earned $18.3 million last season and posted 17.5 points per game on 54.9% shooting, including 56.9% from three-point range, to go with 4.0 rebounds during the playoffs. Hachimura's unsigned status has prompted speculation among league sources about a possible trade or use of the stretch provision that the Lakers could make to free up space involving Jarred Vanderbilt or Deandre Ayton. Vanderbilt is on a $12.43 million expiring contract as he wraps his four-year, $48 million deal. Ayton picked up his $8.1 million option for the 2026-27 season. The Lakers signed Sandro Mamukelashvili to a four-year, $52 million contract and shot 38.9% from three on a career-high 3.7 attempts per game last season, providing similar size and shooting to Hachimura. The San Antonio Spurs had emerged as a possible destination for Hachimura in free agency, but went inandother direction on Wednesday by reaching agreement with Tobias Harris.
items.oneLineZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton

items.title: Darko Rajakovic, Raptors Sign Multi-Year Extension
items.originalTitle: Darko Rajakovic, Raptors Sign Multi-Year Extension
items.headlineZh: Darko Rajakovic 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Darko Rajakovic 签约动向更新
items.summary: Darko Rajakovic and the Toronto Raptors have signed a multi-year contract extension. The Raptors returned to the playoffs for the first time under Rajakovic in 2026 and hope to take another step forward following their acquisition of Kawhi Leonard. "Darko's strong development philosophy and commitment to a team-first culture shine through on a daily basis," Bobby Webster said in a statement. "We've seen these qualities play out on the court - our team plays hard, plays together, and fights until the end. Darko knows there's more to be done, and we're looking forward to seeing the continued growth of this team." Rajakovic was hired by the Raptors in 2023 to replace Nick Nurse as head coach. Rajakovic had previously served as assistant coach of the Memphis Grizzlies.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Darko Rajakovic 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。

items.title: Lakers Interested In Jonathan Kuminga
items.originalTitle: Lakers Interested In Jonathan Kuminga
items.headlineZh: Interested 在 Jonathan 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Interested 在 Jonathan 相关消息更新
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers have interest in signing Jonathan Kuminga in free agency, sources tell The Athletic. Kuminga is a free agent after the Atlanta Hawks declined their $24.3 million option . Kuminga signed a two-year, $48.5 million deal with the Golden State Warriors last September after a prolonged restricted free agency. In 16 games with the Hawks, Kuminga averaged 12.2 points, 5.3 rebounds and 2.1 assists in 22.1 minutes. Kuminga would fill a need for the Lakers for athleticism on the wing.
